hooks.command: out=$(cargo fmt 2>&1); e=$?; [ $e -ne 0 ] && echo "$out" >&2 && exit 2; exit 0
out=$(cargo check 2>&1); e=$?; [ $e -ne 0 ] && echo "$out" >&2 && exit 2; exit 0
out=$(RUSTFLAGS="-D warnings" cargo test 2>&1); e=$?; [ $e -ne 0 ] && echo "$out" >&2 && exit 2; exit 0
out=$(cargo clippy -- -D warnings 2>&1); e=$?; [ $e -ne 0 ] && echo "$out" >&2 && exit 2; exit 0
